2605.14774.title: Identifying Culprits Through Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient Deep Learning Investigation
2605.14774.paper_summary: In the world of AI and advanced technologies investigation aspects identification of a crime or criminal plays a major problem. In this research we focus on a Conventional ways of implicating criminal investigations usually rely on limited data analysis. Finding an optimal and efficient method that will effectively identify criminals from complex datasets and minimise false positives and false negatives is the considered as a challenge. The main novelty approach of this work is based on the deep learning algorithm Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (DDPG) is presented in this paper. We train the DDPG model with a dataset of crime scene material, witness statements and suspect profiles. The algorithm uses features to maximise the likelihood of identifying the offender while minimising the noise impact and irrelevant data. We show the efficacy of the proposed method, where DDPG identified criminals with an amazing accuracy of 95% than other several existing methods.
2605.14774.paper_summary_zh: 在人工智慧和先進技術的世界中，犯罪或罪犯的調查方面識別是一個主要問題。在這項研究中，我們專注於傳統的犯罪調查方式，這些方式通常依賴於有限的數據分析。找到一種最佳且高效的方法，能夠有效地從複雜的數據集中識別罪犯並最小化假陽性和假陰性，被視為一項挑戰。本研究的主要創新方法基於深度學習算法深度確定性策略梯度（DDPG），在本文中提出。我們使用犯罪現場材料、證人陳述和嫌疑人檔案的數據集來訓練DDPG模型。該算法使用特徵來最大化識別罪犯的可能性，同時最小化噪音影響和不相關數據。我們展示了所提出方法的有效性，其中DDPG以驚人的95%的準確率識別罪犯，優於其他幾種現有方法。
2605.14774.author: Lata B T et.al.
2605.14774.authors: Lata B T, Savitha N J
